summary: Iteration 57 - Verified 6 bug fixes for TRANSFORM app. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All bugs verified fixed via Playwright. Fixed onboarding reorder bug during testing.
critical_code_review_comments: kpis.py: Lines 182-210 - recurring_revenue now correctly sourced from billing_enabled members (not payment_schedules)
kpis.py: Lines 193-196 - Coaches excluded from recurring revenue via is_coach flag and COACH keyword filter
annual_reviews.py: Lines 284-302 - auto-generate now checks annual_review_enabled=True before creating bilans
notifications.py: Lines 100-125 - review_reminder_staff_template sends to STAFF with member profile CTA
members.py: Line 35-38 - first_review_date field added to CustomerMember model
MembersPage.js: Lines 984-1139 - Billing and Review sections have clear toggles (green billing, blue review)
OnboardingPage.js: Line 330 - Fixed: now uses filteredOnboarding (sorted alphabetically) instead of pendingOnboarding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified all 6 bug fixes: (1) GET /api/monthly-kpis/2026-03/details returns 47 recurring_revenue items totaling ~6202 CHF from billing_enabled members, no coaches; (2) Onboarding page now uses filteredOnboarding with alphabetical sort - member order preserved when toggling steps; (3) Member edit modal scrolls properly showing all 3 bottom sections; (3b) Enabling review toggle shows frequency dropdown and first_review_date picker; (4) POST /api/annual-reviews/auto-generate creates 0 bilans since no members have annual_review_enabled=True; (5) All recurring_revenue items have member_name populated; (6) Dialog scrolling works correctly showing billing toggle (green), review toggle (blue), and duo checkbox.

FIX_1_Recurring_Revenue_Source.evidence: GET /api/monthly-kpis/2026-03/details returns recurring_revenue from billing_enabled members: 47 items, total 6202 CHF, no coaches

FIX_2_Onboarding_No_Reorder.evidence: Member order preserved after toggle: 'Alex Giraud' still first after clicking step - uses filteredOnboarding with stable alphabetical sort
FIX_2_Onboarding_No_Reorder.code_fix: OnboardingPage.js line 330: changed from pendingOnboarding.filter() to filteredOnboarding

FIX_3_Member_Edit_Scroll.evidence: Playwright found all 3 sections: billing switch (data-testid=billing-switch), review switch (data-testid=review-switch), duo checkbox (data-testid=duo-checkbox)

FIX_3b_Review_Toggle_Fields.evidence: When review toggle enabled, shows: Fréquence du bilan dropdown (Mensuel/Trimestriel/etc) + Date du 1er bilan date picker (data-testid=first-review-date-input)

FIX_4_Auto_Generate_Only_Enabled.evidence: POST /api/annual-reviews/auto-generate returns created=0, total_eligible=0 because no members have annual_review_enabled=True

FIX_5_No_Empty_Names.evidence: All 47 recurring_revenue items have member_name populated, 0 items with empty/unknown names

FIX_6_Dialog_Scrolling.evidence: Modal scrolls properly, all 3 bottom sections visible and interactive via Playwright tests
